mapper.select: SELECT * FROM vr.tn_vr WHERE vr_id = #{vrId} AND use_end_dt > NOW()
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(vr_id, LENGTH(#{prefix}) + 1) AS INTEGER)), 0) FROM vr.tn_vr WHERE vr_id LIKE #{prefix} || '%' AND SUBSTRING(vr_id, LENGTH(#{prefix}) + 1) ~ '^[0-9]+$'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vr.tn_vr ( vr_id, oprtr_id, rprt_yr, vr_ver, vr_type_cd, vr_st_cd, vrfcn_inst_id, er_id, eucr_id, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id ) VALUES ( #{vrId}, #{oprtrId}, #{rprtYr}, #{vrVer}, #{vrTypeCd}, #{vrStCd}, #{vrfcnInstId}, #{erId}, #{eucrId}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE vr.tn_vr SET er_id = #{erId}, eucr_id = #{eucrId}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE vr_id = #{vrId} AND vr_st_cd = 'DRAFT' AND use_end_dt > NOW()
UPDATE vr.tn_vr SET vr_st_cd = 'SBMTD', sbmt_dt = CURRENT_DATE, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE vr_id = #{vrId} AND vr_st_cd = 'DRAFT' AND use_end_dt > NOW()
UPDATE vr.tn_vr SET vr_st_cd = 'RCMDD', rcmmd_dt = CURRENT_DATE, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE vr_id = #{vrId} AND vr_st_cd = 'SBMTD' AND use_end_dt > NOW()
UPDATE vr.tn_vr SET vr_st_cd = 'APRVD', aprv_dt = CURRENT_DATE, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE vr_id = #{vrId} AND vr_st_cd = 'RCMDD' AND use_end_dt > NOW()
UPDATE vr.tn_vr SET vr_st_cd = 'DRAFT', rjct_rsn = #{rjctRsn}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE vr_id = #{vrId} AND vr_st_cd = 'SBMTD' AND use_end_dt > NOW()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vr.tn_vr ( vr_id, oprtr_id, rprt_yr, vr_ver, vr_type_cd, vr_st_cd, vrfcn_inst_id, er_id, eucr_id, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id ) VALUES ( #{vrId}, #{oprtrId}, #{rprtYr}, #{vrVer}, #{vrTypeCd}, 'DRAFT', #{vrfcnInstId}, #{erId}, #{eucrId}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE vr.tn_vr SET use_end_dt = NOW() - INTERVAL '1 minute', last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE vr_id = #{vrId} AND vr_st_cd = 'DRAFT' AND use_end_dt > NOW()
